name: La Aventura De Axel
short_description: this fantastic and spectacula adventure, Get on the skin of Axel, a young man who by strange and mysterious circumstances lost his sister and took a long and incredible way to try to rescue her. In a journey full of magic and strange creatures you will have to help achieve your goal.
detailed_description:
The adventure of Axel, is an adventure in which you have to find the way to pass different labyrinths and puzzles to be able to rescue your sister.
Dive into a world full of magic and fantasy where Axel, a teenager who for different circumstances loses his sister and decides to go to rescue her before something worse can happen, so she has just entered an old mine to undertake a mysterious adventure.

You can play with the mouse or the arrow keys to move the character. You can "enter key" with the different characters of the actions.

For any doubt:
Facebook: La Aventura De Axel
